blended.narrative: Mission Ridge is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.5 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,165 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.2" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 11".
